title: Create Bakery
description: Useful compatibility layer between Create and [Let's Do] Bakery
body:
Create Bakery is a useful compatibility layer between Create and [Let's Do] Bakery (Farm & Charm compat) intended to make baking automatable. the mod includes:

- Mixing recipes for Jams
- Spout Filling recipes for cakes, cupcakes, cookies, and jar filling
- Cake, Pie, and Tart cutting recipes
- Bread Basket sequenced assembly

The mod also adds fluids for the different Jams in [Let's Do] Bakery
